_instructions: Add your music files to client/music/ and list them in the 'songs' array. Each song needs a 'file' (filename), 'title' (display name), and 'tags' array. Use tags from the mood lists below — the more tags match a mood, the more likely that song is chosen for that mood. Songs with zero matches for any mood can still be selected as a fallback.

_generated.prompt: A spirited Celtic-inspired ensemble with wooden flute, mandolin, and tambourine at 140 BPM. Opens with a playful flute melody dancing over gentle mandolin strumming, then layers in rhythmic tambourine and plucked strings. Features call-and-response between flute and mandolin, building to a jubilant section with all instruments before returning to the opening theme. Bright, airy mix with natural reverb suggesting cobblestone squares and open-air markets.

A spirited Celtic-inspired town melody featuring wooden flute, acoustic guitar, and tambourine at 140 BPM. Opens with playful flute trills over gentle guitar strumming, then introduces bouncing tambourine rhythms. Mid-section adds pizzicato strings for market bustle energy. Melody weaves between major scales with occasional ornamental flourishes. Light percussion keeps steady pulse while maintaining airy, festive atmosphere perfect for bustling marketplace scenes.

songs.title: Blades in the Shadow of the Keep

_generated.prompt: A relentless orchestral battle theme at 140 BPM featuring driving taiko drums, staccato strings, and brass stabs. Opens with ominous low brass and timpani rolls, then erupts into frenetic string ostinatos and horn calls. Syncopated percussion creates urgency while cellos and basses pound out a menacing foundation. Dynamic swells between intense peaks and brief, gasping quiet moments before the chaos resumes.

Thunderous war drums and martial brass build tension at 140 BPM. Sharp staccato strings create urgency while French horns announce danger. Features dramatic timpani rolls, aggressive low brass stabs, and piercing trumpet calls. Structure builds from ominous rumbling to full orchestral assault, with brief quiet moments before explosive crescendos. Dark, militaristic atmosphere with metallic percussion and dissonant harmony creating battlefield chaos.

A thunderous orchestral battle anthem at 140 BPM featuring aggressive brass fanfares, pounding timpani, and razor-sharp string ostinatos. Opens with ominous low brass and war drums, explodes into a relentless barrage of horns and cymbal crashes. Features dramatic dynamic swells, staccato string attacks, and triumphant French horn melodies over a foundation of double bass tremolo and snare rolls.

A thunderous orchestral piece at 140 BPM featuring massive brass fanfares, pounding timpani, and aggressive string tremolo. Opens with ominous low brass and building percussion, explodes into full orchestral chaos with clashing cymbals and heroic horn melodies. Dynamic shifts between overwhelming tutti sections and brief, tense quiet moments with solo cello. Heavy emphasis on brass stabs and driving rhythmic momentum. Dark, apocalyptic energy with cathedral-like reverb.

A tranquil orchestral piece featuring solo flute melody over gentle harp arpeggios and soft string pads at 70 BPM. Subtle woodwind harmonies drift in and out while distant chimes sparkle like dewdrops. Natural reverb creates an open forest clearing atmosphere. Track builds to a warm middle section with French horn adding depth, then returns to intimate flute solo. Incorporates subtle bird call motifs woven into the melody.

A tranquil forest meditation featuring bamboo flute, steel string guitar harmonics, and subtle wind chimes at 70 BPM. Begins with distant bird calls and rustling leaves, introduces the flute with a simple pentatonic melody, then layers in gentle guitar arpeggios. Soft rainfall enters midway, while the flute continues its unhurried song. The track breathes naturally with silence between phrases, evoking morning mist through ancient trees.

Deep, resonant cello drones in minor keys layered with subtle timpani rolls and distant metallic clanking. Sparse, echoing piano notes drop like water in vast chambers. Low-frequency synthesizer pads create an oppressive atmosphere while field recordings of actual dripping water and stone scraping add texture. Very slow tempo around 60 BPM with long, sustained notes and plenty of silence between phrases. Dynamic builds through layered strings but never becomes loud, maintaining constant tension.

A slow, atmospheric piece featuring deep cello drones, distant timpani rolls, and sparse piano notes echoing through reverb. Subtle sound design elements like water droplets and stone settling. Builds tension with dissonant string harmonies and low brass swells at 60 BPM. Long, haunting silences punctuated by unsettling whispers of wind through ancient stone corridors.

A rustic tavern ballad featuring wooden flute, mandolin, and upright bass at 90 BPM. Opens with a gentle flute melody over soft bass plucking, then mandolin joins with fingerpicked arpeggios. Mid-section builds with rhythmic strumming and playful flute trills, evoking patrons sharing stories by candlelight. Warm reverb and slight tape saturation give it an aged, intimate quality. Ends with a tender solo flute phrase.

A rustic medieval tavern ballad featuring wooden flute, lute, and hand percussion. Begins with a gentle 3/4 waltz tempo around 90 BPM, building layers of tambourine and bodhrán. The melody dances between major and minor keys, creating nostalgic warmth. Mid-section features playful flute trills over steady lute strumming, then returns to the main theme with added wooden spoon percussion. Authentic period instruments with natural room reverb suggesting stone walls and low wooden beams.

A haunting piece built on pizzicato strings and muted piano at 80 BPM. Begins with solo cello playing a descending minor motif, joined by subtle timpani rolls and distant woodwind whispers. Sparse harp glissandos punctuate the darkness while soft brass pads create an ominous undertone. The melody fragments and reconstructs, never quite resolving, maintaining constant unease. Perfect for exploring abandoned libraries or deciphering ancient texts.

A haunting instrumental piece featuring solo cello and subtle piano at 80 BPM. Opens with long, drawn cello notes creating an atmosphere of uncertainty. Sparse piano punctuates with single notes in minor key. Soft string pad enters midway, building subtle tension without resolution. Occasional creaking sounds and distant whispers of wind. The dynamics remain hushed throughout, with careful use of silence between phrases. Perfect for investigating ancient ruins or deciphering cryptic clues.

Soaring orchestral piece with French horn melody, flowing strings, and gentle woodwind harmonies at 100 BPM. Opens with solo flute over soft string pads, builds to majestic brass fanfare with timpani rolls, then transitions to intimate chamber section with oboe and harp. Features sweeping dynamic swells that evoke vast landscapes and distant horizons. Warm, cinematic mix with natural reverb suggesting open skies and rolling hills.

A soaring orchestral piece in D major at 100 BPM featuring French horns, strings, and wooden flute. Opens with solo flute melody over gentle string pads, builds as brass enters with triumphant harmonies. Celtic harp arpeggios weave through the texture. Dynamic swells suggest cresting hills and vast landscapes. Woodwinds dance playfully in the middle section before returning to the majestic main theme. Bright, airy mix with natural reverb.

A haunting solo cello melody accompanied by sparse, minor-key piano chords at 60 BPM. The cello weaves between low, mournful passages and higher, aching phrases while distant timpani rolls softly in the background. Rain-like arpeggios on harp punctuate the silence between phrases. The piece builds to a cathartic climax with full string section, then fades to just the solo cello and single piano notes. Captures the weight of sacrifice and remembrance.

A haunting solo cello melody in D minor at 60 BPM, joined by gentle rain-stick percussion and distant church bells. The piece builds with layered strings - viola and violin weaving countermelodies - before a lone flute enters with a bittersweet farewell theme. Soft timpani rolls underscore the climax, then everything fades to just the cello's final, trembling notes. Reverb suggests a vast, empty cathedral.

A majestic orchestral fanfare in D major at 140 BPM featuring brass choir, timpani, and soaring strings. Opens with triumphant horn calls answered by trumpets, builds through cascading harp arpeggios and thunderous percussion rolls. French horns carry a noble melody while cellos provide a rich foundation. Climaxes with full orchestra in glorious fortissimo, then gracefully resolves with gentle woodwind flourishes and crystalline bell chimes echoing victory's sweet aftermath.

A majestic orchestral fanfare in D major at 140 BPM featuring brass choir, timpani, and soaring strings. Opens with triumphant horn calls echoing across sections, builds to full orchestra with cymbal crashes and rolling timpani. Features a noble melody passed between trumpet and French horn, supported by rich string harmonies. Includes dynamic swells and brief quieter interludes before culminating in a powerful, uplifting finale with all sections playing forte.

Slow, menacing orchestral horror with deep cellos sawing dissonant intervals, timpani rolling like distant thunder, and brass stingers that pierce through eerie silence. Begins with solo violin playing high, scratchy harmonics over low string drones at 60 BPM. Glass harmonica adds ghostly texture while prepared piano creates metallic scrapes. Builds to crushing forte with full orchestra before dissolving into whispered woodwind fragments and dying echoes.

A spine-chilling orchestral piece in D minor at 60 BPM featuring tremolo strings, prepared piano with extended techniques, and haunting woodwind whispers. Opens with isolated pizzicato notes and breath-like flute passages, builds tension through dissonant string clusters and metallic percussion scrapes, climaxes with violent brass stabs and chaotic timpani rolls, then fades to an unsettling silence broken only by distant celesta chimes. Deep reverb creates cavernous acoustics.

A lively Eastern European folk tune at 120 BPM featuring accordion, clarinet, and upright bass. Opens with bouncing accordion melody, joined by playful clarinet harmonies and walking bass line. Rhythmic hand claps accent the beat. Builds with layered instruments creating festive market atmosphere. Dynamic shifts from intimate trio sections to full ensemble celebration. Maintains cheerful, danceable energy throughout with occasional clarinet flourishes and accordion runs.

A vibrant Mediterranean market tune at 160 BPM featuring bouzouki, frame drum, and diatonic accordion. Opens with bouncing bouzouki arpeggios in major key, joined by rhythmic hand percussion and bright accordion countermelodies. Structure: intro, main theme with call-and-response between bouzouki and accordion, percussion break with tambourine fills, return to theme with all instruments, energetic outro. Sun-drenched atmosphere with lots of staccato notes and ornamental flourishes typical of Greek folk music.

Fierce Nordic war song at 160 BPM driven by thunderous bodhrán and deep war horns. Aggressive nyckelharpa melodies weave through the battle rhythm with harsh bow scrapes and tremolo techniques. Low brass drones underscore the Viking fury while hand percussion adds tribal intensity. Build from menacing whisper to full berserker rage with dramatic dynamic swells and rhythmic breaks for weapon clashes.

songs.title: Neon Fury in the Digital Wastes

_generated.prompt: Pulsing synth arpeggios and orchestral string stabs create mounting tension at 110 BPM. Massive trailer percussion hits punctuate the rhythm while hybrid electronic-orchestral layers build. Dark brass swells emerge between synth pulses. The track escalates with cinematic risers and thunderous timpani rolls, creating a modern epic battle atmosphere with film score intensity.

A haunting requiem mass in D minor at 110 BPM featuring dramatic Spanish classical guitar arpeggios, deep pipe organ bass pedals, and dark sacred choir harmonies. Flamenco-influenced guitar tremolo builds tension while cathedral organ swells create massive dynamic crescendos. Ancient Latin sacred music meets Spanish gothic atmosphere with ceremonial bell tolls punctuating climactic moments.

A menacing gamelan ensemble builds from subtle bronze metallophones into apocalyptic chaos. Starts at 90 BPM with hypnotic interlocking patterns on saron and gender, deep gong ageng punctuations creating ominous resonance. Gradually accelerates to 160 BPP as kendhang drums join with complex polyrhythmic layers. Massive bonang gongs crash in overlapping waves while metallic gambang creates cascading terror. The piece spirals into overwhelming metallic chaos with all instruments striking in brutal synchronized bursts, then sudden silence broken only by a final earth-shaking gong crash.

A meditative classical guitar solo in nylon strings with fingerpicked arpeggios and delicate melodic phrases at 85 BPM. Natural forest soundscape weaves through with authentic birdsong textures, gentle breeze through leaves, and distant water trickling. Guitar maintains warm reverb suggesting cathedral-like tree canopy acoustics. Occasional pauses let nature sounds breathe between musical phrases. Dynamics remain consistently soft with subtle crescendos.

A meditative Indian raga unfolds with sitar's resonant strings creating slow melodic phrases over tanpura's continuous drone at 55 BPM. Tabla enters with gentle, sparse rhythmic touches. The sitar explores microtonal bends and sustained notes in a peaceful morning scale, evoking sunrise over sacred groves. Minimal structure with natural breathing space between phrases, creating deep contemplative atmosphere perfect for meditation.

Rapid staccato pizzicato strings create skittering rhythms like thousands of tiny legs. Pitch-bent violin harmonics whistle at unsettling frequencies while viola tremolo builds underlying tension. Percussion uses fingertips on frame drums and brushed cymbals for silk-like textures. Sparse gamelan metallic strikes punctuate the darkness. Tempo shifts unpredictably from 90 to 140 BPM with sudden pauses and frantic bursts. Whispered breath sounds blend with bow hair scraping strings.

Haunting detuned music box melody fragments scattered throughout abandoned mine tunnels. Creaking wooden support beams groan rhythmically as cold wind moans through shaft openings. Subtle metallic percussion from rusted mining equipment swaying in drafts. Sparse, crystalline chimes from mineral formations catching air currents. Deep underground ambience with dripping water echoes creating natural reverb. Tempo extremely slow and irregular, building tension through silence and sudden creaks.

A boisterous dwarven drinking hall anthem with deep tuba, trombone, and euphonium playing a robust melody over thunderous timpani and bass drums. Accordion adds melodic flourishes while tambourine keeps steady rhythm at 140 BPM. Structure builds from moderate opening to explosive celebratory climax, with brass harmonies that echo off stone walls. Heavy, stomping feel with Germanic folk influences and powerful low-end presence throughout.

A whimsical gnomish tavern tune featuring delicate music box melodies, toy piano arpeggios, and clockwork percussion with tiny bells and wind-up mechanisms. The track moves at a playful 120 BPM with mechanical ticking sounds and miniature steam engine huffs. Glockenspiel adds sparkling accents while mechanical accordion wheezes provide bass notes. The composition has a carousel-like quality with repeating melodic phrases that overlap and interweave like intricate clockwork gears turning.

A slow, contemplative piece at 60 BPM featuring solo bass clarinet weaving through delicate page-turning sounds and distant wind chimes. The bass clarinet plays breathy, uncertain phrases with long pauses between notes. Soft paper rustling textures create rhythm while crystalline chimes provide sparse harmonic touches. The piece builds subtle tension through extended silences and the bass clarinet's increasingly urgent whispers. Minimal dynamics with occasional crescendos on sustained clarinet tones.

A slow, otherworldly composition at 45 BPM featuring bowed waterphone creating haunting metallic tones that resonate like ancient underwater bells. Deep synthesized whale-song calls echo through cavernous reverb chambers while subtle water droplet percussion marks time. The waterphone's ethereal harmonics build tension through overlapping frequencies, creating an unsettling sense of something vast and unknown moving beneath dark waters. Ambient oceanic textures swell and recede like mysterious tidal forces.

Desert caravan melody at 85 BPM featuring Turkish saz with trembling ornaments, hypnotic frame drum patterns, and haunting zurna flourishes. Starts with solo saz playing modal scales, builds with layered percussion and zurna counter-melodies. Captures the vastness of endless dunes, shimmering heat mirages, and ancient Silk Road trading routes. Uses Middle Eastern maqam scales with plenty of space and reverb for that open desert atmosphere.

Rolling concertina melody in lilting 6/8 time at 120 BPM, accompanied by rhythmic creaking of ship timbers and distant boatswain whistle calls. Warm accordion harmonies swell and recede like ocean swells, while gentle rope percussion keeps nautical rhythm. Track builds with layered concertina countermelodies and sea shanty-inspired chord progressions, evoking salt spray and billowing sails under endless blue horizons.

A deeply expressive solo piano piece in B minor at 65 BPM with heavy rubato and romantic period styling. Rich bass octaves support a yearning right-hand melody that rises and falls with emotional intensity. Dynamic swells from pianissimo to forte, with delicate pedaling creating atmospheric resonance. The piece features Chopin-esque ornamentations, suspended chords, and poignant pauses that capture profound loss and reflection.

A deeply mournful solo uilleann pipes melody in A minor at 70 BPM with traditional Irish ornamentation and breath pauses. A low constant drone provides harmonic foundation while the pipes weave a keening lament with grace notes, cuts, and rolls. The melody rises and falls like ancient Celtic grief songs, with moments of silence that speak louder than notes. Raw, authentic Irish folk instrumentation with natural pipe breathing sounds and subtle reverb suggesting stone chambers.

songs.title: The Hero's Reel at Tír na nÓg

_generated.prompt: Fast-paced Celtic celebration in 6/8 time at 160 BPM featuring racing fiddle melodies, triumphant Highland bagpipes, driving bodhrán drum, and jubilant tin whistle harmonies. Starts with solo fiddle then builds with layers of pipes and percussion. Features traditional Irish dance rhythms with explosive pipe fanfares and spirited call-and-response between fiddle and whistle. Pure joy and festive energy throughout.

Upbeat 8-bit chiptune victory march at 180 BPM with cascading square wave arpeggios, punchy triangle bass line, and triumphant sawtooth lead melodies. Features classic video game fanfare flourishes, rapid-fire percussion samples, and energetic call-and-response between channels. Build from simple melody to full four-channel harmony with bright, celebratory tone reminiscent of classic arcade level completion themes.

Extremely slow psychological horror piece at 40 BPM featuring atonal violin scratches, prepared piano with screws and rubber creating metallic pings and muted thuds, long stretches of complete silence broken by single discordant notes, bowed cello harmonics creating ghostly whistles, and occasional vibraphone strikes with mallets dragged across bars. The piece builds through strategic use of negative space, with sounds emerging from silence like thoughts materializing in darkness.

songs.title: When the Gargoyles Stir at Midnight

_generated.prompt: A towering gothic cathedral organ unleashes a menacing minor key fugue at 90 BPM, with chromatic descending passages that spiral into darkness. The melody builds through multiple voices before sudden, jarring silences punctuate the air. Deep pedal tones rumble like thunder while high treble notes shriek like bats in flight. The fugue subject returns in different octaves, creating layers of dread. Staccato passages suggest scurrying creatures, while sustained chords create walls of ominous sound that echo through stone corridors.
